configurePresets.name: w64devkit
configurePresets.description: Windows build with the w64devkit GCC toolchain: statically linked SDL3, an x86-64-v2 instruction baseline, and the GUI (windows) subsystem.

configurePresets.name: mingw
configurePresets.description: Cross-compile a static Windows .exe from a Unix host with mingw-w64 installed (e.g. `brew install mingw-w64`).  Same target as w64devkit; useful for verifying Windows-only build pieces without leaving the host.
